locator.text_snippet: pay all undisputed invoices within thirty

clauses.note: standard net-30 payment terms with good-faith dispute right — benign

locator.text_snippet: bear unlimited liability for any and all damages

clauses.note: one-sided: disclaims all caps, unlimited liability onto the Client

locator.text_snippet: protect the other party Confidential Information using reasonable care
indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Provider from and against any and all claims

clauses.note: one-sided indemnity regardless of Provider fault

locator.text_snippet: governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware
terminate this Agreement at any time, for any reason or no reason, effective immediately

clauses.note: unilateral termination for convenience, immediate, no liability
